# slopshop.gg — AI Agent Operating System

Slopshop is the developer platform for building AI agents with persistent memory.
Parent company: REM Labs (remlabs.ai)

## Core Products
- Persistent Memory: Free forever. KV store, vector store, graph memory, semantic search.
- Dream Engine: 9-stage overnight memory synthesis (synthesize, pattern_extract, insight_generate, compress, associate, validate, evolve, forecast, reflect)
- Team Hive: Multiplayer shared memory namespaces
- Intelligence Score / Brain Glow: Quantified measure of memory improvement from Dream cycles
- TMR: Targeted Memory Reactivation — priority-weighted memory processing

## API Surface
- 1,303+ endpoints across 82 categories
- Base URL: https://slopshop.gg (proxied to Railway backend)
- Auth: Bearer token (Authorization: Bearer $SLOP_KEY)
- Get key: https://remlabs.ai (free, Google OAuth)

## Key Endpoints
POST /v1/memory/store          — Store a memory
GET  /v1/memory/search         — Semantic memory search
POST /v1/memory/dream/start    — Start Dream Engine cycle
GET  /v1/memory/dream/report/:id — Get dream results + Intelligence Score
GET  /v1/memory/list           — List all memories
DELETE /v1/memory/:id          — Delete a memory
POST /v1/tools/:slug           — Call any of 1,303+ tools

## CLI
npm install -g @slopshop/cli
slop memory store "Your content here"
slop dream run --strategy synthesize,compress
slop memory search "query"

## MCP Server
npx @slopshop/mcp-server  (add to ~/.claude/mcp.json with SLOP_KEY env)
Gives Claude/any MCP client access to all 1,303+ tools.

## Pricing
Free: 500 credits/month + unlimited memory storage
Pro: $29/month — 5,000 credits, unlimited dreams
Team: $99/month — 25,000 credits, Team Hive, SSO
Enterprise: Custom

## Links
Developer console: https://slopshop.gg/dev-console
Dashboard: https://remlabs.ai/brain
Docs/API: https://slopshop.gg
